lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਸਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬਰਦਾਯਉ ਉਲਟਿ ਗੰਗ ਪਸ੍ਚਮਿ ਧਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: har naam rasan guramukh baradaayau ulatt gang pascham dhareea |
lines.english: The Guru spoke the Lord's Name with His mouth and broadcast it throughout the world, to turn the tide of the hearts of men.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਖੵ ਅਰੁ ਕਿੰਨਰ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਸਿਧ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: simareh soee naam jakhay ar kinar saadhik sidh samaadh haraa |
lines.english: The gods and heavenly heralds, the Siddhas and seekers and Shiva in Samaadhi meditate in remembrance on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਛਲੁ ਭਗਤਹ ਭਵ ਤਾਰਣੁ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਫੁਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: soee naam achhal bhagatah bhav taaran amaradaas gur kau furiaa |1|
lines.english: That Undeceivable Naam, which carries the devotees across the world-ocean, came into Guru Amar Daas. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਨਖੵਤ੍ਰ ਅਵਰ ਧ੍ਰੂ ਮੰਡਲ ਨਾਰਦਾਦਿ ਪ੍ਰਹਲਾਦਿ ਵਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: simareh nakhayatr avar dhraoo manddal naaradaad prahalaad varaa |
lines.english: The stars and the realms of Dhroo, and devotees like Naaraad and Prahlaad meditate on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸੀਅਰੁ ਅਰੁ ਸੂਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਲਾਸਹਿ ਸੈਲ ਲੋਅ ਜਿਨਿ ਉਧਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: saseear ar soor naam ulaaseh sail loa jin udhariaa |
lines.english: The moon and the sun long for the Naam; it has saved even mountain ranges.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਛਲੁ ਭਗਤਹ ਭਵ ਤਾਰਣੁ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਫੁਰਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: soee naam achhal bhagatah bhav taaran amaradaas gur kau furiaa |2|
lines.english: That Undeceivable Naam, which carries the devotees across the world-ocean, came into Guru Amar Daas. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਿਵਰਿ ਨਵ ਨਾਥ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਸਿਵ ਸਨਕਾਦਿ ਸਮੁਧਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: soee naam sivar nav naath niranjan siv sanakaad samudhariaa |
lines.english: Dwelling upon that Immaculate Naam, the nine Yogic masters, Shiva and Sanak and many others have been emancipated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਧਉ ਅਕ੍ਰੂਰੁ ਤਿਲੋਚਨੁ ਨਾਮਾ ਕਲਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਹਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: audhau akraoor tilochan naamaa kal kabeer kilavikh hariaa |
lines.english: It has erased the sins of Oodho, Akroor, Trilochan, Naam Dayv and Kabeer, in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਵਰਾਸੀਹ ਸਿਧ ਬੁਧ ਜਿਤੁ ਰਾਤੇ ਅੰਬਰੀਕ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: chavaraaseeh sidh budh jit raate anbareek bhavajal tariaa |
lines.english: The eighty-four Siddhas, the beings of supernatural spiritual powers, and the Buddhas are imbued with the Naam; it carried Ambreek across the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਛਲੁ ਭਗਤਹ ਭਵ ਤਾਰਣੁ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਫੁਰਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: soee naam achhal bhagatah bhav taaran amaradaas gur kau furiaa |3|
lines.english: That Undeceivable Naam, which carries the devotees across the world-ocean, came into Guru Amar Daas. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਗਿ ਤੇਤੀਸ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਜਤੀ ਤਪੀਸੁਰ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tit naam laag tetees dhiaaveh jatee tapeesur man vasiaa |
lines.english: The three hundred thirty million angels meditate, attached to the Naam; it is enshrined within the minds of the celibates and ascetics.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਗੰਗੇਵ ਪਿਤਾਮਹ ਚਰਣ ਚਿਤ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: soee naam simar gangev pitaamah charan chit amrit rasiaa |
lines.english: Bhisham Pitama, the son of the Ganges, meditated on that Naam; his consciousness delighted in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੰਭੀਰ ਗਰੂਅ ਮਤਿ ਸਤ ਕਰਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਉਧਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: tit naam guroo ganbheer garooa mat sat kar sangat udhareea |
lines.english: The great and profound Guru has brought forth the Naam; accepting the teachings as true, the Holy Congregation has been saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਛਲੁ ਭਗਤਹ ਭਵ ਤਾਰਣੁ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਫੁਰਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: soee naam achhal bhagatah bhav taaran amaradaas gur kau furiaa |4|
lines.english: That Undeceivable Naam, which carries the devotees across the world-ocean, came into Guru Amar Daas. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਕਿਤਿ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਰਵਿ ਸੁਰਤਰ ਸਾਖਹ ॥
lines.translit: naam kit sansaar kiran rav suratar saakhah |
lines.english: The Glory of the Naam shines forth, like the rays of the sun, and the branches of the Elysian Tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਤ ਇਹੁ ਸਕਯਥੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਨਿਵਾਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam ta ihu sakayath jit naam har ridai nivaasai |
lines.english: Life is fruitful, when the Name of the Lord abides in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਤਰਿ ਦਖਿਣਿ ਪੁਬਿ ਦੇਸਿ ਪਸ੍ਚਮਿ ਜਸੁ ਭਾਖਹ ॥
lines.translit: autar dakhin pub des pascham jas bhaakhah |
lines.english: In the countries of the north, south, east and west, the Praises of the Naam are chanted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਗਣ ਗੰਧਰਬ ਛਿਅ ਦਰਸਨ ਆਸਾਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: sur nar gan gandharab chhia darasan aasaasai |
lines.english: The angelic beings, heavenly heralds, celestial singers and the six Shaastras yearn for the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲਉ ਪ੍ਰਸਿਧੁ ਤੇਜੋ ਤਨੌ ਕਲੵ ਜੋੜਿ ਕਰ ਧੵਾਇਅਓ ॥
lines.translit: bhlau prasidh tejo tanau kalay jorr kar dhayaaeiao |
lines.english: The son of Tayj Bhaan of the Bhalla dynasty is noble and famous; with his palms pressed together, KALL meditates on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਦੇਵ ਤੇਤੀਸ ਅਰੁ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਸਿਧ ਨਰ ਨਾਮਿ ਖੰਡ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaaveh dev tetees ar saadhik sidh nar naam khandd brahamandd dhaare |
lines.english: The thirty-one million gods meditate on the Naam, along with the Siddhas and seekers; the Naam supports solar systems and galaxies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਭਗਤ ਭਵਜਲ ਹਰਣੁ ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਤੈ ਪਾਇਓ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: soee naam bhagat bhavajal haran gur amaradaas tai paaeo |5|
lines.english: The Naam takes away the fears of the devotees about the word-ocean; Guru Amar Daas has obtained it. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਿਰੋਮਣਿ ਸਰਬ ਮੈ ਭਗਤ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam siroman sarab mai bhagat rahe liv dhaar |
lines.english: The Naam is the most sublime of all; the devotees remain lovingly attuned to it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਧਿਓ ਹਰਖੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਸਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeh naam samaadhio harakh sog sam kar sahaare |
lines.english: One who meditates on the Naam in Samaadhi, endures sorrow and joy as one and the same.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਅਮਰ ਗੁਰ ਤੁਸਿ ਦੀਓ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: soee naam padaarath amar gur tus deeo karataar |6|
lines.english: Guru Amar Daas was blessed with the treasure of the Naam, by the Creator Lord, in His Pleasure. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਸੂਰਉ ਸੀਲਿ ਬਲਵੰਤੁ ਸਤ ਭਾਇ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਘਨ ਗਰੂਅ ਮਤਿ ਨਿਰਵੈਰਿ ਲੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sat soorau seel balavant sat bhaae sangat saghan garooa mat niravair leenaa |
lines.english: He is the Warrior Hero of Truth, humility is His Power. His Loving Nature inspires the Congregation with deep and profound understanding; He is absorbed in the Lord, free of hate and vengeance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਧੀਰਜੁ ਧੁਰਿ ਧਵਲੁ ਧੁਜਾ ਸੇਤਿ ਬੈਕੁੰਠ ਬੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis dheeraj dhur dhaval dhujaa set baikuntth beenaa |
lines.english: Patience has been His white banner since the beginning of time, planted on the bridge to heaven.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਅਮਰਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਤਉ ਜੋਗੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satiguroo sev sukh paaeo amar gur keetau jog |7|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, they find peace; Guru Amar Daas has given them this ability. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਸਹਿ ਸੰਤ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਜਿਹ ਕਰਤਾਰਹ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: paraseh sant piaar jih karataarah sanjog |
lines.english: The Saints meet their Beloved Guru, who is united with the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਵਣੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਸ ਖਾਣੁ ਅਰੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਨਾਮ ਰਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਚਾਯ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਸ੍ਟ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: naam naavan naam ras khaan ar bhojan naam ras sadaa chaay mukh misatt baanee |
lines.english: The Naam is His cleansing bath; the Naam is the food He eats; the Naam is the taste He enjoys. With deep yearning, He chants the Sweet Bani of the Guru's Word forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਓ ਜਿਸੁ ਪਸਾਇ ਗਤਿ ਅਗਮ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: dhan satigur sevio jis pasaae gat agam jaanee |
lines.english: Blessed is service to the True Guru; by His Grace, the State of the Unfathomable Lord is known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਲ ਸੰਬੂਹ ਸਮੁਧਰੇ ਪਾਯਉ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: kul sanbooh samudhare paayau naam nivaas |
lines.english: All Your generations are totally saved; You dwell in the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
